ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the film */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the film */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres of the film */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL for the film */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or synopsis of the film */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the film (e.g., Released, Post-Production) */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of release */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the film */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the film */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the film */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "distributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the distributor */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the film was produced */,
  "box_office_revenue" INTEGER /* Total box office revenue */,
  "marketing_budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for marketing */,
  "release_windows" TEXT /* Different release windows (e.g., theatrical, streaming) */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "post_production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of post-production */,
  "post_production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of post-production */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification of the film */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the film's poster */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the trailer */,
  "trailer_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes on the trailer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the keyword is associated with */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword describing the film */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the keyword to the film */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the keyword (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_keywords_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spoken_languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spoken language */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the language is associated with */,
  "iso_639_1" TEXT /* ISO 639-1 code for the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "dialect" TEXT /* Specific dialects of the language used in the film */,
  "language_usage" TEXT /* Extent of language usage in the film (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spoken_languages_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the character */,
  "character_age" INTEGER /* Age of the character */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the character */,
  "actor_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the actor */,
  "actor_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the crew member is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the crew member (0: Unknown, 1: Female, 2: Male) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the crew member works in */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the crew member */,
  "crew_member_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the director is associated with */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "director_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "director_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "director_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "director_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_directors_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, director, marketing) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions the user has within the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
